calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2025 Off Calendar

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-24-616770 WITH CASE CGC-24-620559
Off Calendar Apr-18-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF UPLIFT VENTURES, LLC MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-24-616770 WITH CASE CGC-24-620559

The unopposed motion to consolidate O'Donoghue Construction, Inc. v. Uplift Ventures, LLC, et al., Case No. CGC-24-616770, with Uplift Ventures, LLC v. Markel Insurance Company, et al., Case No. CGC-24-620559, for all purposes including trial is granted. The parties have stipulated. (Ex. A to Reaume Dec.) O'Donoghue Construction, Case No. CGC-24-616770, is designated as the lead case.

Order is signed.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
